Title: Critical Fixes Applied to Chesleylawyers.com
Notes: I conducted a thorough review of chesleylawyers.com and identified multiple issues stemming from a security breach where the attacker used your Gmail credentials to inject hidden spam content across various pages, affecting search visibility and mobile performance. I found unauthorized modifications to plugins and themes, broken contact forms due to invalid ReCaptcha settings, and a significant decline in mobile performance caused by broken scripts. Wordfence also failed to complete a full scan due to outbound connection errors and skipped files. I immediately took corrective actions by changing all passwords, removing spam content, verifying plugins and themes, fixing the ReCaptcha issue, blocking the attacker’s IP, and addressing performance issues to restore security, site functionality, and SEO visibility. To fully resolve the issue, access to the server is required for tasks including cleaning the WordPress database, removing backdoor PHP files, reviewing and cleaning functions.php, removing infected cache files, updating compromised passwords, applying security hardening to wp-config.php, running a full Wordfence/Sucuri scan, and submitting a reconsideration request via Google Search Console. Please share the credentials securely via a service like 1Password or LastPass. The issue is time-sensitive, and we’re ready to begin as soon as access is provided.

Title: Critical Fixes Applied to Chesleylawyers.com
Notes: During a full security review of chesleylawyers.com, I discovered that the website had been compromised after an attacker used exposed Gmail credentials to inject hidden spam content across multiple pages, which negatively impacted SEO visibility, search rankings, and mobile performance. During the investigation I also found unauthorized modifications to plugins and theme files, broken contact and consultation forms caused by invalid ReCaptcha loading, and several broken scripts that were affecting mobile performance. In addition, Wordfence security scans were unable to complete properly due to outbound connection errors and skipped files. I immediately performed emergency cleanup and stabilization actions including removing all injected spam content, verifying and repairing plugins and themes, fixing the ReCaptcha issue so the contact forms work correctly, blocking the attacker’s IP addresses at the server level, updating the server security configuration (.htaccess), and resolving performance issues to restore proper functionality, security, and SEO visibility. During this process it was also discovered that the website’s master configuration file (wp-config.php) had been shared in an unsecured communication channel, exposing sensitive credentials including the database password, database name and username, WordPress secret keys and salts, and the database table prefix, which could allow attackers to access or manipulate the site’s database or bypass login protections. Because of this exposure, these credentials must be changed immediately, including rotating the database password and replacing all WordPress security keys, and we request your permission to proceed with these updates or alternatively you can perform the changes yourself and confirm once completed.

Title: Critical Fixes Applied to Chesleylawyers.com
Notes: During a security review of chesleylawyers.com, I discovered that the site had been compromised after exposed Gmail credentials allowed an attacker to inject hidden spam content, negatively affecting SEO, search rankings, and mobile performance. I also found unauthorized changes to plugins, broken contact forms due to invalid ReCaptcha, and several broken scripts impacting mobile functionality. Wordfence scans failed due to outbound connection errors. Immediate actions were taken, including removing spam content, repairing plugins and themes, fixing the ReCaptcha issue, blocking the attacker’s IP, updating server security (.htaccess), and resolving performance issues. Additionally, the site's master configuration file (wp-config.php) had been exposed, compromising sensitive credentials. I recommend changing the database password, updating security keys, and replacing the credentials immediately. Please confirm if you'd like us to proceed with these updates or if you'd prefer to make the changes yourself.

Title: Critical Fixes Applied to Chesleylawyers.com
Notes:
For ChesleyLawyers.com, ongoing technical fixes and updates are being actively handled to ensure smooth website functionality and improved user experience.

Current work includes resolving errors, updating plugins, and optimizing the Contact Us page, including correcting form settings, map location links, and overall configuration to ensure everything is functioning properly.

Technical investigations are being carried out using WP File Manager, with a detailed review and updates to critical files such as .htaccess and wp-config.php. All configurations are being carefully tested to identify and fix underlying issues affecting site performance and functionality.

Some fixes are currently in progress and pending completion, as they require specific access permissions to proceed further. Once access is granted, the remaining issues will be fully resolved to ensure the website operates seamlessly.
